zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Venables於1398年11月1日出生在英國爾維爾姆斯洛福時，她的父親William Richard de Venables of Bollen22歲，母親Johanna Joan de Massey23歲。她於1419年5月3日與Edmund de Trafford I在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年9月23日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾享年64歲，埋葬在英國爾維爾姆斯洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Venables于1398年11月1日出生在英国爾維爾姆斯洛福时，她的父亲William Richard de Venables of Bollen22岁，母亲Johanna Joan de Massey23岁。她于1419年5月3日与Edmund de Trafford I在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年9月23日在英国英格兰藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾享年64岁，埋葬在英国爾維爾姆斯洛福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Venables was born on 1 November 1398, in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, her father, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, was 22 and her mother, Johanna Joan de Massey, was 23. She married Edmund de Trafford I on 3 May 1419, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 23 September 1463, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Venables est née le 1 novembre 1398, à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Johanna Joan de Massey, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund de Trafford I le 3 mai 1419, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 septembre 1463, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Venables am 1. November 1398 in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Richard de Venables of Bollen 22 und ihre Mutter Johanna Joan de Massey 23. Sie hat am 3. Mai 1419 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Edmund de Trafford I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. September 1463 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Venables è nata il il 1 novembre 1398 nel Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Johanna Joan de Massey, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Edmund de Trafford I il 3 maggio 1419, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 settembre 1463, nel Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Wilmslow, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Venablesが1398年11月1日にイギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウで生まれた時，父William Richard de Venables of Bollenは22歳，母Johanna Joan de Masseyは23歳であった。1419年5月3日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでEdmund de Trafford Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年9月23日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーで64歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Venables(이)가 1398년 11월 1일 영국 체실르 윌슬로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Richard de Venables of Bollen(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Joan de Massey(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1419년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Edmund de Trafford I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 9월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 윌슬로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Venables nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1398, em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Joan de Massey, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund de Trafford I em 3 de maio de 1419, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1463, em Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Venables родилась 1 ноября 1398 г. в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Richard de Venables of Bollen было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Joan de Massey, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund de Trafford I 3 мая 1419 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 сентября 1463 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Venables nació el 1 de noviembre de 1398, en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Johanna Joan de Massey, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Edmund de Trafford I el 3 de mayo de 1419, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1463, en Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
